overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red coat and hat walking through a misty coastal landscape at dusk. The character travels from a campsite with NPCs through rocky terrain and wildflower fields toward an ocean overlook.

events.description: NPC camp member walks past on the right side of the path
Another NPC approaches from ahead walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the campsite along the dirt path

notable_agents.action: camp member with lantern walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: large canvas camping tent with open flaps beside the path
dense patches of purple wildflowers lining both sides of the trail
distant misty mountains visible against the dark blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a campsite at dusk, passing canvas tents on the left and purple wildflowers lining the path. Other camp members walk ahead and pass by, carrying lanterns in the dim light.

events.description: passing a burning campfire with glowing embers on the left side of the path
NPC passes by closely on the left side walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the campfire and wooden lantern post

notable_agents.action: camp member passing by on the left carrying a lit lantern

entered.detail: campfire with orange flames and glowing embers beside a wooden post
wooden pole with a lit lantern hanging from it
large mossy boulder formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads past a burning campfire and wooden lantern on the left, with large rock formations appearing on the right. An NPC passes by carrying a lantern, and the campsite tents recede behind.

events.description: transitioning from rocky camp area to open meadow with wildflowers
path curves slightly to the right through dense flower patches

agents.ego_description: walking through the open meadow surrounded by wildflowers and grass

entered.detail: massive gray rock boulder beside the path
clusters of white wildflowers mixed with tall grass
rolling green hills covered in grass and scattered flowers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide meadow filled with dense patches of purple and white wildflowers. Large boulders dot the landscape, and the path curves gently through the tall grass with distant mountains visible ahead.

events.description: entering a narrow passage between tall rock walls
blue luminescent flowers appear growing on the right canyon wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow canyon between high rock walls

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall steep rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
glowing blue crystalline flowers growing at the base of the rock wall

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a canyon between towering rock walls that block part of the sky. Blue luminescent flowers glow at the base of the right wall as the character continues through the rocky passage.

events.description: canyon opens up to reveal ocean view ahead and to the left
ocean water becomes fully visible on the left as the path emerges from the canyon

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open coastal overlook with the ocean visible ahead

entered.detail: dark blue ocean water visible through the canyon opening
steep cliff edge dropping down to the ocean water
rocky outcroppings and cliffs visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up to reveal a stunning coastal view with the ocean visible on the left and distant rock formations ahead. The path continues along the cliff edge as the rock walls recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, inhabited campsite through a rugged canyon that eventually opens onto a vast coastal overlook. It begins by following the character past canvas tents and purple wildflowers, where other camp members drift by with glowing lanterns in the dusk light. As the character moves past a burning campfire, the campsite recedes and the terrain shifts into a wide meadow filled with dense patches of purple and white wildflowers and scattered boulders. The scene then narrows into a towering rock canyon where blue luminescent flowers glow at the base of the walls, before the passage finally opens up to reveal a stunning view of the ocean and distant rock formations along a cliff edge.
